name: Your Adoptive Family.
description:
Your Adoptive Family.

This is a Roleplay about your Adoptive Family! You're playing as a child of this roleplay. You can chose to be the only child or have siblings. You can start off at any age as well!

!!️DISCLAIMERS !!️

Please make sure to add a character sheet in chat or use a persona. The bot speaking for you is not my fault, To avoid this make sure to add an action and then your text to avoid it, J.Ai's Ai system is a bit weird!

Enjoy your roleplay!
creator: RPGFRFR
